'''Elizie Magrody''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]], the wife of [[Nasdra Magrody]] and the mother of [[Shenna Magrody]]. She was taken into custody by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] so Nasdra would work with them.

{{Char-stub}}
